gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands tall and gestures with both hands toward the screen while smiling to welcome learners.
a person steps forward slightly and raises both arms in excitement while announcing the topic of subtraction.
a tutor bends slightly at the knees and spreads arms wide to illustrate five objects in a row on the table.
a person moves one arm away from their body while tilting the head, encouraging the class to think about what remains.
a tutor claps hands together and then opens arms wide as if inviting students to count along with them.
a person leans forward slightly, raising a finger to demonstrate taking one object away, while looking inquisitively at the learners.
a tutor jumps in place joyfully and throws both hands in the air to celebrate the learning achieved today.
a person uses one hand to gesture outward while the other hand mimics taking away an object, emphasizing the concept of subtraction.
